title: Emergency department presentation with rash and bleeding from mouth and nose
description: Main encounter at Ochsner University Hospital / Ochsner Health for rash, coagulation disorder, and bleeding from the mouth and nose.
sourceExcerpt: 06/07/2023 emergency department presentation at Ochsner University Hospital / Ochsner Health for rash, coagulation disorder, and bleeding from the mouth and nose.

title: Severe thrombocytopenia with platelet count of 1 documented
description: Platelet count of 1 was documented with severe thrombocytopenia and coagulation disorder workup.
sourceExcerpt: Platelet count of 1 was documented with severe thrombocytopenia and coagulation disorder workup.

title: Dexamethasone and platelet treatment given
description: Dexamethasone was administered and platelet-related treatment/workup was started.
sourceExcerpt: Dexamethasone was administered and platelet-related treatment/workup was started.

title: Transferred for hematology evaluation
description: Transferred to another facility for hematology evaluation and further management.
sourceExcerpt: Transferred to another facility for hematology evaluation and further management.

title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head.
sourceExcerpt: At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head.

title: CT head showed no acute intracranial injury
description: CT head showed no acute intracranial injury with left periorbital soft tissue swelling.
sourceExcerpt: CT head showed no acute intracranial injury with left periorbital soft tissue swelling.

title: Grouped medications
description: Encounter medications documented: hydromorphone, ondansetron, ketorolac, Tdap, acetaminophen.
sourceExcerpt: Encounter medications documented: hydromorphone, ondansetron, ketorolac, Tdap, acetaminophen.

title: Transferred to Shannon by air transport
description: Patient was transferred to Shannon Medical Center by air transport.
sourceExcerpt: Patient was transferred to Shannon Medical Center by air transport.
